ber:Yanni ur ixeddem ara laman deg tsednan yettεassan igerdan

ber:Aydi n Yanni dindin kan yuɣal ixeddem laman deg Skura
ber:Sami d amdan aydeg tzemrem ad tgem laman
ber:Ur yezmir ara ad yeg yiwen deg-s laman
ber:Mennad ur yelli ara akk yetteg laman deg Baya

ber:Ɣef leḥsab-nwent, Tom ulac deg-s laman﹖
